title: gelasine uruguaiensis subsp. uruguaiensis
intro: Gelasine uruguaiensis subsp. uruguaiensis, also known as Guaycura, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae, native to the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Gelasine uruguaiensis subsp. uruguaiensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and decoctions, have been used by indigenous communities for centuries to promote healing and well-being.
